creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Fri Aug  2 11:17:07 2013
New Revision: 324161
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/324161

Log:
  finance/trytond: update to 2.4.8
  
  - Update to 2.4.8
  - Change maintainer new address
  
  PR:		ports/180905
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias petermann-it.de> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/finance/trytond/Makefile
  head/finance/trytond/distinfo

Modified: head/finance/trytond/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/trytond/Makefile	Fri Aug  2 10:59:31 2013	(r324160)
+++ head/finance/trytond/Makefile	Fri Aug  2 11:17:07 2013	(r324161)
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	trytond
-PORTVERSION=	2.4.5
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.8
 CATEGORIES=	finance python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
 
-MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann-it.de
 COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Server)
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
@@ -16,7 +16,9 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/mx/_
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}lxml>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-lxml \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Genshi>0.5.1:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-genshi \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}relatorio>=0.2.0:${PORTSDIR}/print/py-relatorio \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}polib>=0.7.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-polib
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}polib>=0.7.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-polib \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>=1.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil
+
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 CONFLICTS=	trytond-2.[68].*

Modified: head/finance/trytond/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/trytond/distinfo	Fri Aug  2 10:59:31 2013	(r324160)
+++ head/finance/trytond/distinfo	Fri Aug  2 11:17:07 2013	(r324161)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (trytond-2.4.5.tar.gz) = 73a8e5c0942b621760026eaaa267eea6db3bd5426ad2eeb26b39e300fac17f27
-SIZE (trytond-2.4.5.tar.gz) = 441771
+SHA256 (trytond-2.4.8.tar.gz) = 9aa83c4e8deac341878f8923a556fe7daa3ac8ee6bc8720260d2f71af72a7a0f
+SIZE (trytond-2.4.8.tar.gz) = 441914
